case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. JESUS EIBAR DOMINQUEZ GONZALEZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 SERVED DEC-27-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, JESUS EIBAR DOMINQUEZ

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, JESUS EIBAR DOMINQUEZ $1,334.55 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,419.55 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,334.55 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, JESUS EIBAR DOMINQUEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-15-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-15-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-15-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC ZOCO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JESUS EIBAR DOMINQUEZ GONZALEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED DEC-27-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, JESUS EIBAR DOMINQUEZ
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RE: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT - UNABLE TO FORWARD

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-15-2017 - JUDGMENT.
